https://blog.bensuperpc.org/fr/about/.body:
My name is Bensuperpc, I am a software engineer and a Hardware enthusiast, on this website, I will share my projects, benchmarks, and tutorials.
I am French and autistic, I am passionate about technology, video games, astronomy and history.
Main projects
Top repositories and organizations
           
My hardware
In this section, I will list my hardware configuration (not exhaustive).
Main desktop
My main desktop is a custom build, I use it for gaming and somtimes for work.
Specifications:



 Custom build


 AMD Ryzen 7 5700X 8c16t


 Zalman CNPS20X


 4x16GB Corsair Vengeance DDR4 3200MHz


 MSI B550M Mortar WiFi


 1TB Samsung 980 Pro NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD (Linux)


 2TB Samsung 970 EVO Plus NVMe PCIe 3.0 SSD (Windows)


 4TB Crucial X6 USB 3.2 Gen 2 SSD (Steam library)


 KFA2 Nvidia RTX 3060 Ti 8GB


 MSI MPG 1000W 80+ Gold


 Logitech G502 Hero


 Samsung Odyssey G7 32" 1440p 240Hz


 Dell S2721DGF 27" 1440p 165Hz


 NEAT Bumblebee II


 HyperX Cloud II

Main server
My main server is a thinkcentre M720q, I use it for my game servers, web servers, and build servers.
Specifications:



 Lenovo ThinkCentre M720q (2018)


 Intel I7 9700T 8c8t


 2x16GB Corsair Vengeance DDR4 3200MHz (Downclocked to 2666MHz)


 Intel UHD 630


 Lenovo ThinkCentre M720q motherboard


 2TB Samsung 970 EVO Plus NVMe PCIe 3.0 SSD


 500GB NONAME SATA SSD


 Lenovo proprietary charger 90W

Main laptop
My main laptop is a Framework Laptop 13, I use it mainly for my work and my personal projects.
Specifications:



 Framework Laptop 13 (2023)


 AMD Ryzen 7 7840U 8c16t


 2x32GB Corsair Fury impact PnP DDR5 5600MHz


 AMD Radeon 780M


 2TB Samsung 990 PRO NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD


 Anker Prime 100W 2023


 Built-in 13.5" 2.8K 120Hz


 Built-in

Secondary laptop
My secondary laptop is a Lenovo ThinkPad T480, for personal projects only.
Specifications:



 Lenovo ThinkPad T480 (2018)


 Intel I5 8350U 4c8t


 2x16GB Corsair Vengeance DDR4 2400MHz


 Intel UHD 620


 512Go Samsung 970 PRO NVMe PCIe 3.0 SSD


 128Go Western Digital NVMe PCIe 3.0 SSD


 Anker Prime 100W 2023


 Built-in 14" 1080p 60Hz


 Built-in

Main phone
My main phone is a Pixel 6:
Specifications:



 Google Pixel 6 (2021)


 Google Tensor G1 (8c8t)


 8GB LPDDR5


 Mali-G78 MP20


 256GB UFS 3.1


 30W USB PD 3.0


 Built-in 6.4" 1080p 90Hz

Secondary phone
My secondary phone is a Oneplus 8:
Specifications:



 Oneplus 8 (2020)


 Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 (8c8t)


 12GB LPDDR4 4266MHz


 Adreno 650


 256GB UFS 3.0


 Warp Charge 30T 30W


 Built-in 6.55" 1080p 90Hz


 Built-in

 Daisy

This website
This website use Zola static site generator, the abridge theme and Font Awesome.
JS is only needed for the search bar, the rest of the website is pure HTML and CSS, you can disable JS without any issue.
You can find the source code of this website on bensuperpc.github.io.
Source

Inspired by Nemez

https://blog.bensuperpc.org/fr/contact/.body:
Mail
Pour me contacter, je vous recommande de m'envoyer un mail à l'adresse suivante : bensuperpc[at]gmail.com ou à mon adresse secondaire bensuperpc[at]protonmail.com.
Réseaux sociaux
Vous pouvez également me contacter via les réseaux sociaux suivants :
Bluesky : bensuperpc
Twitter : @bensuperpc
GitHub : bensuperpc
Instagram : bensuperpc
Telegram : bensuperpc
Discord server : bensuperpc

Mode hors-ligne
Désolé, aucun cache n'a été trouvé et il semble que vous soyez hors ligne, une connexion est requise.

https://blog.bensuperpc.org/fr/privacy/.body:
Confidentialité

Ce site ne crée ni n'utilise de cookies.
Ce site ne stocke pas de données dans le navigateur pour être partagées, envoyées ou vendues à des tiers.
Aucune information personnelle n'est partagée, envoyée ou vendue à des tiers.

Date d'entrée en vigueur: 1er janvier 2025
